name: USS Viking (ARS 1)
events: 3 Nov 1944 USS Blenny (Cdr. W.H. Hazzard, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Tills (Lt.Cdr. J.L. Brooks, USNR), USS Hemminger (Lt.Cdr. J.R. Bodler, USNR), USS Viking, USS ATR-26 (Lt. J.H. Kelly, USN), USS Plaice (Cdr. C.B. Stevens, Jr., USN) and USS Spikefish (Cdr. N.J. Nicholas, USN).
